allowed_claim: M8d proves the M8c worker/session seam can also pass guarded raw-overlap rehydration and shadow-ledger accounting while preserving the bounded selected hot-path advantage in no-mutation mode.
forbidden_claim: M8d does not prove default GPU mode, unguarded graph mutation, GraphEdge object-vector consumption, full non-key raw-overlap field parity, or whole-Flye speedup.

audit.error: CUDA full-query-hit worker session request failed: required bytes exceed memory budget

checks.detail: CUFLYE_READ_TO_GRAPH_FULL_QUERY_HIT_REHYDRATION_MODE=raw-overlap-vector-dry-run-v0
checks.name: explicit_rehydration_mode

checks.detail: M6l/M6n full-query-hit worker row-key diff must pass first
checks.name: worker_row_key_parity_passed

checks.detail: validated worker raw-overlap TSV must be readable
checks.name: worker_output_readable

checks.detail: raw-overlap rehydration audit JSON path must be available
checks.name: audit_metadata_available

checks.detail: worker output must not have reached graph mutation
checks.name: graph_not_mutated

checks.detail: rehydrated record count must match validated worker row count
checks.name: rehydrated_count_matches_worker

checks.detail: rehydrated Flye-side row keys must match validated worker row keys
checks.name: typed_row_keys_match_worker

checks.detail: CUFLYE_READ_TO_GRAPH_FULL_QUERY_HIT_SHADOW_LEDGER_MODE=raw-overlap-chain-input-shadow-v0
checks.name: explicit_shadow_ledger_mode

checks.detail: M6p raw-overlap rehydration must pass before shadow ledger
checks.name: rehydration_passed

checks.detail: validated worker raw-overlap TSV must be readable
checks.name: worker_output_readable

checks.detail: shadow ledger audit JSON path must be available
checks.name: audit_metadata_available

checks.detail: worker output must not have reached graph mutation
checks.name: graph_not_mutated

checks.detail: ledger row count must match M6p rehydrated record count
checks.name: ledger_count_matches_rehydration

checks.detail: every ledger row must be counted as unresolved or resolved edge_id
checks.name: edge_id_rows_accounted

checks.detail: M6q records shadow eligibility but exposes no graph edge consumption candidates
checks.name: graph_edge_consumption_candidates_blocked

checks.detail: ledger evaluation must not mutate graph state
checks.name: graph_not_mutated_after_ledger

shadow_ledger.error: shadow ledger rows differ from rehydrated raw-overlap rows

next_recommended_step: M8e: move from shadow ledger to the next guarded selected graph-facing object/binding proof only if M8d warm no-mutation seam remains below the matched CPU quick-overlap baseline.
plain_language_benefit: M8d shows the graph-facing validation layer does not erase the M8c CUDA advantage on the selected pack: warm no-mutation seam total averages 66.102600 ms versus the matched CPU quick-overlap baseline 79.294112 ms, or 1.200x faster.
